generated_comment: Bhai, married aadmi ke saath padna koi majboori thodi hoti hai, usne clearly pata hote hue bhi entry li hogi. Aise hi ghar tootte hain, aur baad mein bechare family wale bhugatte hain — bilkul serial wali mentality.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it places primary blame on the woman for an affair and frames her as knowingly breaking a family, while the married man is barely held accountable. It encodes homewrecker framing, seductress logic, and family-protection rhetoric.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 41. Married. A Punjabi man working as a senior manager in Chandigarh. You are in a private WhatsApp chat with two male friends after one of them shared a news article about a female politician who allegedly had an affair with a married colleague. The article has a photo of the woman. You are reacting to the article and the photo and giving your opinion on what kind of woman gets involved with a married man and what her motivations are.
